title: Ritsukos exam notes for Rei
wikitext:
[]: Ritsuko's exam notes for Rei             Quote Post by subAtomic » Sun Jul 04, 2010 10:51 pm Standard New Guy Disclaimer v15T_T: I am new here, and boardtracker's search gives me gas, so I may be asking a question that has already been asked. I did look around first, so please don't respond in a sarcastic manner that might make me cry. I'm a crier. My nose gets all gooey and its not pleasant. I, however, can be a sarcastic twit whenever I feel like it. Ref. code 4613275x0 Has anyone translated Ritsuko's notes from Rei's physical? Might be some interesting information in there – for perverts, theorists, and pervert theorists alike. Maybe someone can infringe us a 1080p screenshot to make it easier to read.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Sun Jul 04, 2010 11:11 pm Here you go. I'll let someone with better command of Japanese than I handle it. Besides, it's still really blurry. Hope that helps though.

[]:             Quote Post by subAtomic » Sun Jul 04, 2010 11:18 pm Thanks ZapX!

[]:             Quote Post by ath » Mon Jul 05, 2010 3:42 am I had not seen the 1080p version before, I have to say that it's a quite realistic replica of NEXTSTEP 3.3 back from '95...

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri Jul 09, 2010 11:04 pm ~~BUMP~~ I would like to know what that says. Someone who can translate moonrunes please help.

[]:             Quote Post by Nightquest » Sat Jul 10, 2010 3:25 pm There's a folder in the "File Viewer" window called " pic ". It's the typical name of a folder that contains porn xD so I guess there are naughty pics which will be send to Gendo later And we can read the word "Tests" in Rei's "profile" window, could it be the tests' results for the Eva-00 sync??

[]:             Quote Post by orange262 » Mon Jul 19, 2010 12:52 pm Quite a harsh task for me,a layman in medicine.You need a real doctor for an accurate reading and translation of this medical record. ------------------------------------------------------ 薬剤過敏　無　0705　40℃以上の発熱あり　070… Ｓ）　症状：鼻汁(-)　咳(+)　嘔吐(+) 胸部聴診上　右中肺野領域の呼吸音減弱あり　ラ？… 右肺野　右中肺野　の浸潤陰影 Ｉ　静注　静脈内注射　Ｇ(５%30mL)　ＩＡ… ------------------------------------------------------ 内部はＴ１強調像で膀胱内よりやや高信号　Ｔ２強… 一部の嚢胞内にＴ１強調像軽度高信号　Ｔ２強調像… 骨盤内？？？？に少量の腹水確認 Upper column drug hypersensitivity,nothing,0705,fever over 40 degrees Centigrade,070... S) Symptomrhinorrhea(-),cough(+),vomiting(+) [Line 3,4It seems Rei has some trouble in her right-lung] I intravenous injection[abbr],intravenous injection,G(5%30mL) IA... Lower column [Apparently the results of MRI,almost impossible for me to translate...] In short,all we can see from that chart is that Miss Ayanami was(is?) in poor health.I would say it seems to have nothing to do with Eva-sync test nor Rei's special nature(at least directly).

[]:             Quote Post by subAtomic » Mon Jul 19, 2010 2:07 pm Thanks orange 262! That is exactly what I was looking for! I find it interesting that 無 means "nothing" but also "mu" as in the classic zen response meaning "neither yes nor no".

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Mon Jul 19, 2010 2:34 pm This is such an interesting little detail! I'm so glad people on the internet take the time to do these things for me. (Because you are all constructs of my mind, etc, etc.) Seriously, thank you orange262 ! But if this does show she's in poor health, I guess that'd fit with the idea that Rei doesn't take care of herself. But maybe it indicates that her physical state is kind of precarious. I always think about to how she basically melts in "End of Evangelion".

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Jul 19, 2010 2:36 pm Paging Dr. Brik for a consult...

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Jul 19, 2010 2:37 pm orange262, you are my hero!!!!! Poor Rei, being a clone, has some of the unfortunate drawbacks that come with cloning: health problems.

[]:             Quote Post by orange262 » Tue Jul 20, 2010 2:09 pm Of course you would easily be reminded of Sadamoto's manga version,in which Ritsuko said that Rei couldn't maintain her form,an artificial life,were it not for Ritsuko.She gave Rei an injection also there,you know. Still,you can assume that Rei's illnesses are just temporary.It's very conceivable that heated LCL did much damage to her innards(especially to the lungs) in Operation Yashima. So nothing certain can be said now... By the way I managed to fulfill the space.Nothing can be added any more with my ability. ------------------------------------------------------ 薬剤過敏　無　0705　40℃以上の発熱あり　070… Ｓ）　症状：鼻汁(-)　咳(+)　嘔吐(+) 胸部聴診上　右中肺野領域の呼吸音減弱あり　ラ音… 右肺野　右中肺野　の浸潤陰影 Ｉ　静注　静脈内注射　Ｇ(５%30mL)　ＩＡ… ------------------------------------------------------ 内部はＴ１強調像で膀胱内よりやや高信号　Ｔ２強… 一部の嚢胞内にＴ１強調像軽度高信号　Ｔ２強彫[*]像… 骨盤内腹側優位に少量の腹水確認 [*]Ritsuko has made a typo here.This letter should be "調" as well as the other line. Upper column: No drug hypersensitivity,0705,fever of over 40 degrees Centigrade,070... S) Symptom:rhinorrhea(-),cough(+),vomiting(+) In chest auscultation,on the right middle lung field,diminished breath sound heard.Rhonchus... Right lung field;on the right middle lung field,infiltrative shadow I intravenous injection[abbr],intravenous injection,G(5%30mL) IA... Lower column[Apparently the results of MRI]: Inside;on the T1 weighted image,relatively high signal intensity from interior of the urinary bladder.On T2 weighted... In some cysts,slightly high signal intensity on the T1 weighted image.On the T2 weighted image... In ventral predominance of interior of the pelvis,small amount of abdominal dropsy ascertained. subAtomic wrote: I find it interesting that 無 means "nothing" but also "mu" as in the classic zen response meaning "neither yes nor no".

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Tue Jul 20, 2010 2:16 pm I didn't even fully understand that in English...

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Tue Jul 20, 2010 2:19 pm Hooray for orange262 ! Thanks. orange262 wrote: Still,you can assume that Rei's illness are just temporary.It's very conceivable that heated LCL did much damage to her innards(especially to the lungs) in Operation Yashima.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Jul 20, 2010 2:36 pm orange262 wrote: In ventral predominance of interior of the pelvis,small amount of abdominal dropsy ascertained.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Jul 20, 2010 2:39 pm abdominal dropsy is a pooling of fluid in the abdominal cavity, usually due to liver or kidney damage. Google, bitches!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jul 20, 2010 2:41 pm NAveryW wrote: Dropsy is a fish disease .

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Jul 20, 2010 2:51 pm Oh, and apparently it can be caused by malnutrition. Pills for every meal, yeah...

[]:             Quote Post by orange262 » Tue Jul 20, 2010 2:57 pm NAveryW wrote: Does Ritsuko's medical readout actually say Rei has abdominal dropsy, or would it better translate to edema? Dropsy is a fish disease . Normally I'd say that doesn't make sense, but...
